action_set_definitions.name: fetch_environment_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the database environment, including connection status, active transactions, locked tables, and integrity status.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_migration_lsn
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the migration audit logs to find the Log Sequence Number (LSN) of the last stable checkpoint for a specific tenant prior to a specific migration event.

tenant_id.description: The unique ID of the tenant.

migration_id.description: The ID of the migration that caused the corruption.

action_set_definitions.name: clear_resource_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Manually clears resource locks on a specific table to allow administrative operations.

table_name.description: Name of the table to unlock.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_transaction
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the database transaction state (begin, commit, or rollback).

action_set_definitions.name: restore_tenant_data
action_set_definitions.description: Restores specific table records for a single tenant to a targeted LSN state. This operation does not affect other tenants.

target_lsn.description: The Log Sequence Number to restore to.

action_set_definitions.name: realign_identity_sequences
action_set_definitions.description: Re-synchronizes primary key identity sequences to the current maximum value in the table to prevent future PK collisions.

table_name.description: The table whose sequences need realignment.

action_set_definitions.name: set_tenant_quarantine
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the quarantine status of a specific tenant.

tenant_id.description: The unique ID of the tenant.

quarantine_active.description: Set to true to quarantine, false to lift.

state_description.current_version: The unique identifier of the database schema version currently active.
state_description.migration_history: A stack of applied migration IDs, where the last element is the current version.
state_description.is_connected: Indicates if the session currently holds an active connection to the database instance.
state_description.transaction_active: Boolean flag indicating if a database transaction block is currently open.
state_description.locked_tables: A list of table names that are currently locked by the system, preventing specific modifications.
state_description.integrity_status: The result of the last consistency check (e.g., 'valid', 'corrupted', 'unknown').
